Basic definition
.
Term 1
:   Definition 1
.
<dl>
<dt>Term 1</dt>
<dd>Definition 1</dd>
</dl>
.

Multiple definitions
.
Term 1
:   Definition 1a
:   Definition 1b
.
<dl>
<dt>Term 1</dt>
<dd>Definition 1a</dd>
<dd>Definition 1b</dd>
</dl>
.

Multiple terms and definitions
.
Term 1
:   Definition 1

Term 2
:   Definition 2a
:   Definition 2b
.
<dl>
<dt>Term 1</dt>
<dd>Definition 1</dd>
<dt>Term 2</dt>
<dd>Definition 2a</dd>
<dd>Definition 2b</dd>
</dl>
.

Loose definition (blank line before colon)
.
Term 1

:   Definition 1
.
<dl>
<dt>Term 1</dt>
<dd>Definition 1</dd>
</dl>
.

Multi-paragraph
.
Term 1

:   Definition 1

    Second paragraph.
.
<dl>
<dt>Term 1</dt>
<dd>
<p>Definition 1</p>
<p>Second paragraph.</p>
</dd>
</dl>
.

Inline formatting in term
.
**Bold term**
:   Definition
.
<dl>
<dt><strong>Bold term</strong></dt>
<dd>Definition</dd>
</dl>
.

Inline formatting in definition
.
Term
:   Definition with *emphasis* and **bold**
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>Definition with <em>emphasis</em> and <strong>bold</strong></dd>
</dl>
.

Lazy continuation
.
Term
:   Definition
lazy continuation
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>Definition
lazy continuation</dd>
</dl>
.

Tab after colon
.
Term
:	Definition
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>Definition</dd>
</dl>
.

Tilde marker
.
Term
~   Definition
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>Definition</dd>
</dl>
.

Nested list in definition
.
Term
:   Definition

    - item 1
    - item 2
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>
<p>Definition</p>
<ul>
<li>item 1</li>
<li>item 2</li>
</ul>
</dd>
</dl>
.

Nested code block
.
Term
:   Definition

        code block
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>
<p>Definition</p>
<pre><code>  code block
</code></pre>
</dd>
</dl>
.

Nested blockquote
.
Term
:   Definition

    > blockquote
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>
<p>Definition</p>
<blockquote>
<p>blockquote</p>
</blockquote>
</dd>
</dl>
.

Heading after deflist
.
Term
:   Definition

# Heading
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>Definition</dd>
</dl>
<h1>Heading</h1>
.

Empty definition rejected
.
Term
:   
.
<p>Term
:</p>
.

Bare colon rejected
.
Term
:
.
<p>Term
:</p>
.

Two terms not deflist
.
Term 1
Term 2
:   Definition
.
<p>Term 1
Term 2
:   Definition</p>
.

Deflist with paragraph before
.
Paragraph text.

Term
:   Definition
.
<p>Paragraph text.</p>
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>Definition</dd>
</dl>
.

Deflist with paragraph after
.
Term
:   Definition

Paragraph text.
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>Definition</dd>
</dl>
<p>Paragraph text.</p>
.

Mixed tight
.
Term 1
:   Definition 1

Term 2
:   Definition 2
.
<dl>
<dt>Term 1</dt>
<dd>Definition 1</dd>
<dt>Term 2</dt>
<dd>Definition 2</dd>
</dl>
.

Tight multiple defs with blank between terms
.
Apple
:   Red fruit

Orange
:   Orange fruit
.
<dl>
<dt>Apple</dt>
<dd>Red fruit</dd>
<dt>Orange</dt>
<dd>Orange fruit</dd>
</dl>
.

Loose multiple definitions
.
Term

:   Definition 1

:   Definition 2
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>
<p>Definition 1</p>
</dd>
<dd>
<p>Definition 2</p>
</dd>
</dl>
.

Code in definition
.
Term
:   Definition with `code`
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd>Definition with <code>code</code></dd>
</dl>
.

Link in definition
.
Term
:   [link](http://example.com)
.
<dl>
<dt>Term</dt>
<dd><a href="http://example.com">link</a></dd>
</dl>
.

Link in term
.
[Term](http://example.com)
:   Definition
.
<dl>
<dt><a href="http://example.com">Term</a></dt>
<dd>Definition</dd>
</dl>
.
